title: sign.bats: set GPG_TTY=/dev/null
body: Set GPG_TTY=/dev/null, which should hopefully prevent ENOTTY errors during gating tests in CI.  h/t  @cevich

comments.body:
Suggestion: Add this to `helpers.bash` so it's set for all tests and forever.  I can't think of a reason why that should never ***not*** be the case while running BATS.

Otherwise LGTM.
